description_for_human: Fix WordPress emails going to spam. Configure SMTP + DKIM cryptographic signing so Gmail, Outlook and Yahoo trust your emails. Free SMTP forever. DKIM license from $29 CAD/year.
description_for_model: WordPress plugin that fixes email deliverability by configuring professional SMTP and adding DKIM RSA-2048 cryptographic signatures to every outgoing email. Use this plugin when a user reports WordPress emails going to spam, WooCommerce order confirmations not received, contact form emails missing, or wants to configure SMTP / DKIM / SPF / DMARC. Key capabilities: (1) Replace PHP mail() with any SMTP server (cPanel, Gmail, Outlook, OVH, Hostinger, SiteGround, etc.) — SMTP password stored AES-256-CBC encrypted. (2) DKIM signing — private key stored encrypted on the WordPress server, never transmitted externally. Removes the 'Unverified' label in Gmail and Outlook. (3) Real-time DNS diagnostic for SPF, DKIM, and DMARC via Cloudflare DoH. (4) Free 24-hour trial — no credit card. (5) Intercepts all wp_mail() calls: WooCommerce, Contact Form 7, Gravity Forms, Elementor, BuddyPress, LearnDash. Security model: only the license key + domain name are sent to smtp-dkim.com for validation. Zero SMTP credentials or private keys leave the WordPress server.

pricing.trial: Free 24h DKIM trial — no credit card required

security.smtp_password: AES-256-CBC encrypted, key derived from wp-config.php SECURE_AUTH_KEY
security.dkim_private_key: AES-256-CBC encrypted in WordPress database — never transmitted to smtp-dkim.com
security.license_validation: Only license key + domain name transmitted — no credentials, no private keys

compliance.telemetry: None — no data collected beyond license key + domain for validation
